concept: Conceptualize a sports game involving competitive terraforming where teams score by transforming neutral terrain to match their assigned environmental blueprint. Players utilize specialized equipment to alter elevation, introduce water features, establish vegetation, and modify climate factors within their zone of control. Defensive strategies involve creating geographical barriers to limit opponent expansion or introducing invasive elements that gradually convert enemy territory. Match dynamics evolve as transformed terrain affects movement options and equipment effectiveness, with fully developed ecosystems providing enhanced terraforming capabilities. Championship matches feature complex target environments requiring multiple interdependent biomes working in harmony, testing teams' ecological understanding alongside their competitive skills.
